exploreUrl:
<js>
var type=['type','首页推荐','recommend','最新发布','newest','观看最多','hot'],s='';
var trigger=['trigger','1','混合','2','角色扮演','3','口腔音','4','耳朵清洁','7','咀嚼音','16','同人音声','5','皮肤护理','6','物体刮擦','8','头发按摩','9','水的声音','10','心跳声','11','耳边轻语','12','指触音','13','唱歌哄睡','14','史莱姆','15','双人ASMR'];
for(var i=1;i<type.length;i=i+2)<
s=s+type[i]+'::/video?'+type[0]+'='+
type[i+1]+'&currentPage={{page}}
'>
for(var i=1;i<trigger.length;i=i+2)<
s=s+trigger[i+1]+'::/trigger/[id]?id='+trigger[i]+'&currentPage={{page}}
'>
s
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
result=JSON.parse(result.match(/>(\{[\s\S]*\})</)[1]).props.pageProps.videoData;

var list=[];
var name=result.name;
var url=result.files[0].audio_path;
list.push({
name:name,
url:url
});list
</js>
